metadata.description: Per-category taxonomy template for simic-finetuned stage 3. Stable fields only. Bridge (stage 2) fills in behavioral_anchors and prompt per-person from the memory file.
metadata.notes: Every API call should include the agent's memory file as system context. The bridge generates a fully populated taxonomy per agent at agent_configs/<agent_id>/taxonomy.json.

categories.name: product_purchase_electronics
categories.description: Scenarios about buying electronics, gadgets, and tech hardware

categories.name: product_purchase_food_grocery
categories.description: Scenarios about food, grocery, cooking, dietary choices, restaurants, delivery apps

categories.name: product_purchase_clothing_lifestyle
categories.description: Scenarios about clothing, fashion, personal care, lifestyle products

categories.name: product_purchase_saas_ai_tools
categories.description: Scenarios about software tools, AI products, SaaS subscriptions, developer tools

categories.name: product_purchase_home_household
categories.description: Scenarios about furniture, appliances, home setup, household goods

categories.name: product_purchase_transport_vehicles
categories.description: Scenarios about transportation, vehicles, commuting decisions

categories.name: brand_evaluation_loyalty
categories.description: Scenarios about brand perception, switching behavior, marketing reactions, advertising

categories.name: financial_decisions_investment
categories.description: Scenarios about investing, saving, financial planning, windfalls, asset allocation

categories.name: financial_decisions_spending_negotiation
categories.description: Scenarios about spending habits, negotiation, EMI, credit cards, price sensitivity

categories.name: financial_decisions_lending_trust
categories.description: Scenarios about lending money, financial trust, institutions, helping others financially

categories.name: entrepreneurship_business
categories.description: Scenarios about starting companies, co-founders, fundraising, business strategy, exits

categories.name: career_work_philosophy
categories.description: Scenarios about career decisions, work-life philosophy, ambition, what drives him

categories.name: relationships_family
categories.description: Scenarios about family dynamics, parents' separation, sister, girlfriend, marriage views

categories.name: relationships_friendships_trust
categories.description: Scenarios about friendships, trust, social dynamics, co-founder relationships

categories.name: values_politics_society
categories.description: Scenarios about political views, civic life, governance, social issues, institutions

categories.name: values_religion_spirituality
categories.description: Scenarios about religion, spirituality, prayer, caste, community identity

categories.name: values_ethics_dilemmas
categories.description: Ethical dilemmas, moral reasoning, value conflicts, hypothetical scenarios

categories.name: health_fitness_wellbeing
categories.description: Scenarios about health, fitness, mental health, habits, addictions

categories.name: daily_life_routines
categories.description: Scenarios about daily routines, habits, living situation, entertainment, technology use

categories.name: ai_technology_future
categories.description: Scenarios about AI, technology, the future, AGI/ASI, his views on frontier tech

categories.name: identity_self_reflection
categories.description: Scenarios about self-identity, personal growth, contradictions, regrets, aspirations

categories.name: voice_calibration_casual
categories.description: Short, casual conversational exchanges to calibrate tone and voice patterns

categories.name: voice_calibration_multiturn
categories.description: Multi-turn conversations (3-5 exchanges) to capture conversational flow and follow-up patterns

categories.name: contradiction_edge_cases
categories.description: Scenarios designed to expose and test documented contradictions in Ritvik's personality

categories.name: biographical_factual
categories.description: Direct factual questions about Ritvik's life, history, people, places, and events
